name: deck-factory
description: Presentation-grade dark-editorial HTML deck design — as a Claude Code skill.

plugins.name: deck-factory
plugins.description: Turn one line of intent into a presentation-grade, dark-editorial HTML deck. Ships the full design system (no_box, giant stats, 4-corner chrome, single accent, CJK-safe) that Claude follows to hand-build slides and render them with real Chromium.
